name: Yuze Zheng
title: PhD Candidate in Chemistry
intro: Yuze Zheng is a photographer based in Chicago. His work focuses on wildlife, city life, natural light, and quiet visual details found in everyday surroundings.
photographyStatement: Alongside his photography, he is a PhD candidate in Chemistry at the University of Chicago, where his academic work shapes his attention to materials, interfaces, structure, and observation.
shortIntro: Photography from Chicago: wildlife, birds, city life, landscapes, light, and quiet everyday moments.
biography: Yuze Zheng is a photographer based in Chicago. His work focuses on wildlife, city life, natural light, and quiet visual details found in everyday surroundings.
Alongside his photography, he is a PhD candidate in Chemistry at the University of Chicago, where his academic work shapes his attention to materials, interfaces, structure, and observation.

photographyThemes.title: Birds & Wildlife
photographyThemes.description: Encounters with birds, animals, and natural spaces in and around Chicago.

photographyThemes.title: City & Street
photographyThemes.description: Urban scenes, architecture, reflections, and everyday movement.

photographyThemes.title: Landscape & Light
photographyThemes.description: Open views, weather, water, sunrise, sunset, and atmosphere.

photographyThemes.title: Quiet Details
photographyThemes.description: Small moments that are easy to miss but visually meaningful.
